name: The Biggest Tax for the Oldest Profession
description: Enforce exploitative taxes on adult services workers in target zones.

success.narrative: Your agents enforce the new tax regime. The zone's wealth flows upward — toward your coffers.

failure.narrative: The operation is reported to foreign authorities. Your agent's cover is blown.

name: Funny Money Printing Press
description: Flood a target zone's economy with counterfeit currency.

success.narrative: Counterfeit bills flood the zone. Economic output craters while your vaults swell.

failure.narrative: The forgery is detected. Your agents are captured and the foreign org is alerted.

name: Siphon Zone Accounts
description: Systematically drain financial accounts in a target zone.

success.narrative: Funds transfer silently. Zone residents wake to lighter wallets and no obvious culprit.

failure.narrative: The breach is detected. Your agent is captured or expelled and the foreign org is alerted.

name: Forge Trade Documents
description: Fabricate trade agreements or tariff documents to manipulate a zone's economy.

success.narrative: The documents are accepted. Smuggling routes in the zone open up and economic output quietly diminishes.

failure.narrative: The forgery is detected. Your agent is expelled and the plot is on cooldown in this zone.

name: Inspiring Speech
description: The Overlord or a high-Oratory agent delivers a rousing address to empire citizens.

success.narrative: The speech lands. Empire citizens are inspired, loyal, and briefly convinced this is the good life.

failure.narrative: The address falls flat. Apparently the speechwriter had an off day.

name: Reconnaissance
description: Gather intelligence on a foreign zone.

success.narrative: Your agent returns with detailed intelligence. Zone reports are now more accurate.

failure.narrative: Your agent is captured, expelled, or forced to flee under fire.

name: Sabotage
description: Damage or destroy a specific building in a foreign zone without attempting to take the zone.

success.narrative: The target building is damaged. Zone output falls and the foreign org scrambles to respond.

failure.narrative: Your agents are captured or killed. The foreign org is alerted and increases security.

name: Plant Disinformation
description: Corrupt the intel available to a foreign org about an empire zone.

success.narrative: The enemy's intelligence on the zone is now thoroughly corrupted. Their recon will return noise for weeks.

failure.narrative: The deception is discovered. The enemy becomes more careful — and your zone intel suffers for it.

name: Spread Conspiracy Theories
description: Seed conspiracy theories among citizens in a target zone.

success.narrative: Citizens in the zone have become convinced that the moon is a government project. Their intelligence drops. Their loyalty shifts.

failure.narrative: The campaign fizzles. Nobody took the bait.

name: Organize Antiwork Unions
description: Plant agents in a foreign zone to convince citizens that work is bad, actually.

success.narrative: A significant portion of the zone's workforce has quit. Economic output drops as workers pursue their passion projects.

failure.narrative: The workers remain unconvinced. Personnel loyalty to their GO increases and your agents are expelled.

name: False Flag Operation
description: Attribute an empire action or a fabricated incident to another org.

success.narrative: The false flag lands. Perceived EVIL drops as another org takes the blame. Their reputation suffers accordingly.

failure.narrative: The false flag is exposed. Perceived EVIL rises sharply and the empire's credibility takes a hit.

name: Rob a Bank
description: Hit a bank in a target zone for direct money gain.

success.narrative: The vault is emptied. The local news will be talking about this for weeks. You launder or pocket the proceeds.

failure.narrative: Something went wrong. Agents captured or killed. The EVIL is hard to shake regardless.

branchingChoice.prompt: How do you handle the proceeds?

name: Forge Identity Documents
description: Create false identities for empire agents operating in foreign zones.

success.narrative: Flawless documents. Your agents can now operate in foreign zones with significantly reduced detection risk.

failure.narrative: The forgery is detected. Your agents are flagged and face increased scrutiny for the foreseeable future.

name: Encryption Protocols
description: Deploy advanced encryption across empire communications.

success.narrative: The encryption is live. Enemy surveillance operations will find only noise.

failure.narrative: Deployment fails. Communications remain exposed.

name: Counterintelligence Sweep
description: Assign agents to monitor and intercept foreign espionage operations empire-wide.

success.narrative: Foreign espionage operations continue to stumble over your defenses. An agent has been identified.

failure.narrative: The sweep runs but catches nothing this cycle.

name: Establish a Front Company
description: Plant a legitimate-seeming business in a target zone as a persistent imperial asset.

success.narrative: The front company opens its doors. A legitimate-looking asset now provides cover and passive income.

failure.narrative: The company is exposed. Agents are seized along with the assets.

name: Send Ade
description: Infiltrate a target zone with cult-like loyalty manipulation. Send them some ade. Cool-ade. Tons and tons of Cool-ade.

success.narrative: The ade flows freely. A portion of the zone's citizens now feel an inexplicable warmth toward your empire.

failure.narrative: Your agents are expelled. Loyalty toward the empire in the zone drops.

branchingChoice.prompt: The operation has exceeded expectations. Do you push further?

name: Assassination
description: Kill a specific named target in a foreign zone.

success.narrative: The target is eliminated. The foreign org enters a succession crisis.

failure.narrative: The attempt fails. Agents are captured or killed, the target goes into hiding, and intel on them resets to zero.

branchingChoice.prompt: The target was a GO leader. Do you publicize the assassination?

name: Destabilize Zone
description: Weaken a zone's defenses and loyalty ahead of a planned Takeover.

success.narrative: Zone defenses are compromised. Loyalty is fractured. A Takeover Zone plot here will find much easier going.

failure.narrative: Your agents are expelled. The zone is now on high alert.

name: Abduction
description: Capture a specific person from a foreign zone and bring them to empire territory.

success.narrative: The target is extracted and added to your captives list.

failure.narrative: Extraction fails. Agents are captured or killed and the foreign org is alerted.

branchingChoice.prompt: The captive is in your hands. What do you do with them?

name: Surveillance Tap
description: Plant listening devices in a target zone's key locations.

success.narrative: The tap is live. Intercepted communications from this zone will begin appearing in your intelligence reports.

failure.narrative: The devices are discovered. Your agent is captured and the tap is gone.

name: Purge Foreign Agents
description: Sweep an empire zone for foreign operatives.

success.narrative: Foreign agents identified and captured or expelled. The zone is clean — for now.

failure.narrative: Foreign agents go to ground. The sweep catches no one and citizens resent the disruption.

name: Establish a Smuggling Route
description: Set up a persistent underground supply line between two zones.

success.narrative: The route is open. Goods and agents move between zones with reduced risk and cost.

failure.narrative: The route is exposed. Agents are captured and both zones become more alert.

name: Recruit Criminal Network
description: Absorb an existing criminal network in a target zone into the empire's operations.

success.narrative: The network falls in line. Black market access improves and intel flows in on zone citizens.

failure.narrative: The network turns hostile. Your agents are at risk and the zone's orgs are alerted.

name: Fortify Zone
description: Establish and maintain ongoing defensive infrastructure in an empire zone.

success.narrative: Fortifications hold. Incoming Takeover attempts will find stiff resistance.

failure.narrative: Fortification effort flags this cycle. Defenses are slightly below optimum.

name: Free Internet
description: Provide free internet access to citizens in a target zone as a loyalty-building measure.

success.narrative: Free internet arrives. Loyalty climbs. Citizens post enthusiastic content about their benevolent providers.

failure.narrative: Deployment fails. Nothing to show for the effort.

branchingChoice.prompt: Do you include a surveillance backdoor?

name: Back a Puppet Candidate
description: Engineer the political rise of an empire-aligned figure in a foreign zone.

success.narrative: A suitable candidate has been identified and approached. They are... receptive.

failure.narrative: No viable candidate found. The plot chain fails at the first step.

success.narrative: The candidate's campaign is gaining traction, funded discreetly through empire channels.

failure.narrative: Funding is traced back to the empire. Agents captured or expelled. EVIL spikes.

success.narrative: Rival candidates are discredited, distracted, or dissuaded. The path is clear.

failure.narrative: The suppression is exposed. Significant blowback.

success.narrative: The candidate wins. Zone control transfers to the empire.

failure.narrative: The installation collapses. Agents are captured and EVIL surges.

name: Engineer a Coup
description: Destabilize a foreign org's leadership and install a new leader directly loyal to the empire.

success.narrative: Leadership patterns mapped. Vulnerabilities identified.

failure.narrative: Surveillance detected. The plot chain ends here.

success.narrative: Key personnel are now loyal to the empire. The coup has its conspirators.

failure.narrative: The turncoats fail to hold. Coup collapses.

success.narrative: The coup succeeds. A new, empire-loyal leader is installed.

failure.narrative: The coup collapses catastrophically. Empire reputation suffers across all orgs.

name: Global Propaganda Campaign
description: A sustained, coordinated multi-zone propaganda effort targeting world opinion of the empire.

success.narrative: The messaging is sharp, targeted, and implausibly reasonable.

failure.narrative: The messaging is exposed as empire output. Campaign fails here.

success.narrative: Agents are in place across all target zones. The broadcast begins.

failure.narrative: An agent is compromised. The campaign collapses mid-execution.

success.narrative: The campaign lands. Perceived EVIL drops. Target zone citizens are warming to the empire.

failure.narrative: The campaign is exposed as fabrication. Massive perceived EVIL spike.

name: Takeover Zone
description: Attempt to seize control of a foreign zone. Core military victory mechanic.

success.narrative: Your forces arrive at the zone perimeter.

failure.narrative: Travel disrupted by foreign patrol.

success.narrative: Defenses are overcome. The zone is vulnerable.

failure.narrative: Defenses hold. Agents are killed in combat.

success.narrative: The zone falls. Its buildings and citizens are now under empire control.

failure.narrative: The assault fails. Agents are killed in combat and the empire is repelled.

name: Disinformation Network
description: Build a sustained, multi-zone false intelligence infrastructure that corrupts enemy recon across the empire.

success.narrative: False data sources planted across the empire. Enemy analysts will find their readings... misleading.

failure.narrative: The false sources are exposed. Enemy intel on empire zones improves.

success.narrative: Agents are embedded. The network is live.

failure.narrative: An agent is compromised. Network collapses.

success.narrative: All enemy recon operations targeting empire zones now return corrupted data.

failure.narrative: The network is dismantled. Enemy intelligence surges.

name: Operation Clean Hands
description: Make the world believe the Adjudicators are corrupt. Requires perceived EVIL below 60.

success.narrative: Fabricated Adjudicator misconduct evidence is in circulation. Three orgs have received the documents. Suspicion begins.

failure.narrative: The forgery is detected. Adjudicators are alerted. The plot chain fails and perceived EVIL increases.

success.narrative: Two or more orgs formally question Adjudicator legitimacy. Adjudicator capability is temporarily reduced.

failure.narrative: The narrative collapses. Empire identified as source. Adjudicators rally and gain capability.

success.narrative: The world turns on the Adjudicators. Their mandate is revoked. The org enters collapse.

failure.narrative: Catastrophic failure. Empire identified as orchestrator. All orgs increase hostility. Adjudicators gain maximum capability from worldwide sympathy.

name: The Hypno Disco Ball
description: Deploy a hyper-refractive light installation capable of broadcasting hypnotic frequencies across an entire zone.

success.narrative: The Disco Ball hums to life. Citizens in the zone undergo mass loyalty conversion. They are also having an extremely good time.

failure.narrative: The device malfunctions. Agents are injured and the foreign org now knows you have optical research capabilities.

name: Blot Out the Sun
description: Launch a stratospheric particulate dispersal system that reduces global solar energy output — then sell the solution back to a dependent world.

success.narrative: The dispersal system is complete. Global sunlight reduction is now technically feasible.

failure.narrative: Development fails. Massive investment lost.

success.narrative: Deployment successful. The sky darkens slightly over populated zones. The world has not yet made the connection.

failure.narrative: Deployment fails. The world traces the attempt to the empire.

success.narrative: Infrastructure online. The empire holds the world's sunlight hostage.

failure.narrative: Infrastructure fails. The plot cannot proceed to extortion.

success.narrative: All non-empire orgs must now pay ongoing tribute or face mounting penalties. The world complies — for now. Maximum aggression from all orgs begins immediately.

failure.narrative: The extortion apparatus collapses. The sun returns. The investment is lost.

name: Control the World's Water Supply
description: Seize control of global freshwater infrastructure through physical infiltration and technological override.

success.narrative: Global freshwater distribution fully mapped. Key nodes identified.

failure.narrative: Mapping operation discovered. Security on water infrastructure increases.

success.narrative: Control devices are in place at key distribution nodes.

failure.narrative: Infiltration detected. Agents killed or captured. Mass hostility increase.

success.narrative: Control systems online. Freshwater distribution can now be modulated remotely.

failure.narrative: Systems fail. The plot cannot proceed.

success.narrative: Water leverage activated. Non-empire orgs pay tribute or face Sick status spreading among their citizens.

failure.narrative: Leverage fails to hold. The infrastructure seizure collapses.

name: The Supersoldier Program
description: Develop and deploy genetically or chemically enhanced soldiers. Results may vary.

success.narrative: The program produces results. A cohort of enhanced soldiers is ready — stronger, faster, more durable.

failure.narrative: Something has gone very wrong in the lab.

name: Soylent Green
description: Develop a cheap, efficient food product to feed empire citizens. Made from a proprietary and confidential ingredient.

success.narrative: Soylent Green enters production. Empire food costs drop to zero. Citizens are healthy and — unaccountably — there are fewer of them than before.

failure.narrative: Production fails. The investment is lost.

name: Pigeon Missile Barrage
description: Deploy a coordinated strike of missile-guided pigeons (or pigeon-guided missiles, depending on available research) against a target zone.

success.narrative: The pigeons — or missiles, it depends how you look at it — strike true. The target zone suffers significant military damage.

failure.narrative: The pigeons go off course. There may be collateral damage in adjacent zones. The After Action Report will be difficult to write.
